title: SakonLottery Home Variant 1
prompt:
Title: 4. Shopping Cart Review
Context: Core Shopping Workflow: Searching to Adding to Cart for SakonLottery.
Description of the screen: Step 4: My Shopping Cart Review. A full-screen list of all selected lottery tickets. Each item shows the 6-digit number, quantity adjuster, and price. Bottom section has a summary of total items and total price. A large, full-width red 'Proceed to Payment' button sits at the bottom. Consistent branding with the red header. Variant 4 of 4 in Workflow.
